name: atomyx
description: Atomyx — Agentic Test Orchestration Module. Cross-platform mobile test framework driven by Claude (or any MCP client). This is the workspace root; the shipping binary lives in packages/core-driver-cli as `atomyx-driver`.
author: Solrum

scripts.build: for d in packages/core-driver*; do (cd "$d" && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm run build); done
scripts.test: for d in packages/core-driver*; do (cd "$d" && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm test); done
scripts.test:all: for d in packages/core-driver*; do (cd "$d" && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm test); done
